evals.prompt: 我上传了一个 Mango ERP 待发布 Excel，里面大概 200 条 AliExpress 汽配产品。请用 产品图片1 作为参考，为每条产品生成 AI 优化主图，并返回带 主图 列的新 Excel。
evals.expected_output: Agent starts a fresh full task with prepare --limit 0 --run-mode full --new-task, uses the default 2 workers with claim --count 10 --lease-minutes 15, marks each row immediately, and does not call the final task complete until strict build and verify pass.

evals.prompt: 这个 Excel 之前已经做过 3 条样图，现在继续把整个表都处理完，不要重复那 3 条，最后给完整 Excel。
evals.expected_output: Agent treats a newly uploaded Excel as a new task by default, uses --new-task to create a fresh timestamped batch folder, and resumes an older batch only when the user explicitly asks to continue it.

evals.prompt: 处理过程中有几条图片生成失败或被限流了，先继续处理其他产品，失败的后面再补，不要从头开始。
evals.expected_output: Agent marks failed rows with errors, continues claiming pending rows, later retries failed/pending rows, and never treats failed rows as complete.

evals.prompt: 先把现在已经生成的图片路径放进 Excel 给我吧，剩下的你继续跑。
evals.expected_output: Agent may build an interim workbook only with --allow-partial, clearly labels it as interim, and does not claim final completion until verify --run-mode full returns ok true.
